title: neoachmandra boholensis
intro: Neoachmandra boholensis, also known as the "Butterfly Plant" or "Aerial Plant", is a rare and endangered epiphytic plant species native to the Philippines. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Neoachmandra boholensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for various forms of application, including oral and topical administration.
